translations.en: I have a memory of Paris.
translations.de: Ich habe eine Erinnerung an Paris.
translations.yue: 我有一段關於巴黎嘅回憶。
translations.ru: У меня есть воспоминание о Париже.
translations.vi: Tôi có một kỷ niệm về Paris.
translations.nl: Ik heb een herinnering aan Parijs.
translations.uk: У мене є спогад про Париж.
translations.hi: मुझे पेरिस की एक याद है।
translations.el: Έχω μια ανάμνηση από το Παρίσι.
translations.nb: Jeg har et minne fra Paris.
translations.sv: Jag har ett minne från Paris.
translations.da: Jeg har et minde fra Paris.
translations.ja: パリの思い出があります。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject clitic pronoun, elided before a vowel; subject of the verb 'ai'.
Main verb in present tense (1SG), expressing possession.
Indefinite article introducing a singular count noun.
Common noun; direct object of 'ai'.
Preposition introducing a complement specifying origin/content.
Proper noun; object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Ce souvenir me fait toujours sourire.

translations.fr: Ce souvenir me fait toujours sourire.
translations.en: This memory always makes me smile.
translations.es: Este recuerdo siempre me hace sonreír.
translations.de: Diese Erinnerung bringt mich immer zum Lächeln.
translations.it: Questo ricordo mi fa sempre sorridere.
translations.ko: 이 추억은 항상 나를 미소 짓게 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个回忆总是让我微笑。
translations.ru: Это воспоминание всегда заставляет меня улыбаться.
translations.pt: Esta lembrança sempre me faz sorrir.
translations.he: הזיכרון הזה תמיד גורם לי לחייך.
translations.tr: Bu anı beni her zaman gülümsetir.
translations.vi: Kỷ niệm này luôn làm tôi mỉm cười.
translations.nl: Deze herinnering laat me altijd glimlachen.
translations.uk: Цей спогад завжди змушує мене усміхатися.
translations.hu: Ez az emlék mindig mosolyra késztet.
translations.hi: यह याद मुझे हमेशा मुस्कुराने पर मजबूर करती है।
translations.pl: To wspomnienie zawsze wywołuje u mnie uśmiech.
translations.el: Αυτή η ανάμνηση πάντα με κάνει να χαμογελώ.
translations.nb: Dette minnet får meg alltid til å smile.
translations.sv: Detta minne får mig alltid att le.
translations.ro: Amintirea asta mă face mereu să zâmbesc.
translations.cs: Tato vzpomínka mě vždy přiměje usmát se.
translations.da: Dette minde får mig altid til at smile.
translations.fi: Tämä muisto saa minut aina hymyilemään.
translations.ja: この思い出はいつも私を笑顔にしてくれます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying 'souvenir'; points to a specific item/memory.
Common noun; grammatical subject of 'fait'.
1st person singular clitic object pronoun; marks the experiencer affected by 'fait'.
Main verb (3SG present); causative verb agreeing with 'souvenir'.
Adverb of frequency modifying 'fait'.
Infinitive verb complement of 'faire' indicating the caused action.

sentences.target: On garde ce souvenir dans la boîte.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ gaʁd sə suvəniʁ dɑ̃ la bwat/

translations.fr: On garde ce souvenir dans la boîte.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ gaʁd sə suvəniʁ dɑ̃ la bwat/
translations.en: We keep this memory in the box.
translations.es: Guardamos este recuerdo en la caja.
translations.de: Wir bewahren dieses Andenken in der Schachtel auf.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把这件纪念品放在盒子里保存。
translations.yue: 我哋將呢件紀念品收喺盒入面。
translations.ru: Мы храним этот сувенир в коробке.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cất món kỷ vật này trong hộp.
translations.ar: نحن نحتفظ بهذا التذكار في الصندوق.
translations.nl: We bewaren dit aandenken in de doos.
translations.uk: Ми зберігаємо цей сувенір у коробці.
translations.hu: Ezt az emléktárgyat a dobozban tartjuk.
translations.hi: हम इस यादगार वस्तु को डिब्बे में रखते हैं।
translations.el: Κρατάμε αυτό το αναμνηστικό στο κουτί.
translations.nb: Vi oppbevarer denne suveniren i boksen.
translations.id: Kami menyimpan kenang-kenangan ini di dalam kotak.
translations.sv: Vi förvarar den här souveniren i lådan.
translations.da: Vi opbevarer denne souvenir i kassen.
translations.ja: この思い出の品を箱にしまっておきます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; impersonal 'one' often used with the meaning 'we'.
Main verb (3SG present), expressing the action performed by 'On'.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'souvenir'; refers to a specific item.
Common noun; direct object of 'garde'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article agreeing in gender and number with 'boîte'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans' indicating location.

sentences.target: Nous ramenons un souvenir pour toi.

translations.fr: Nous ramenons un souvenir pour toi.
translations.en: We're bringing back a souvenir for you.
translations.de: Wir bringen dir ein Souvenir mit.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们给你带回一个纪念品。
translations.yue: 我哋會為你帶返一件紀念品。
translations.pt: Vamos trazer uma lembrança para você.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi mang về cho bạn một món quà lưu niệm.
translations.nl: We nemen een souvenir voor je mee.
translations.hi: हम तुम्हारे लिए एक यादगार लेकर आ रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi tar med en souvenir til deg.
translations.sv: Vi tar med en souvenir till dig.
translations.da: Vi tager en souvenir med til dig.
translations.ja: あなたにお土産を持って帰ります。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun; subject of 'ramenons'.
Main verb (1PL present), indicating the action performed by 'Nous'.
Indefinite article introducing the direct object.
Common noun; direct object of 'ramenons'.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary.
2nd person singular stressed pronoun; object of 'pour' indicating the beneficiary.

We're bringing back a souvenir for you.
